command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time, shlex
cmd = ['bun','test','src/knowledge/retrieval.test.ts','src/knowledge/retrieval.e2e.test.ts','src/knowledge/multi-query-retrieval.test.ts']
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, text=True, capture_output=True)
duration = int((time.time()-start)*1000)
print(f'COMMAND: {shlex.join(cmd)}')
print(f'EXIT_CODE: {proc.returncode}')
print(f'DURATION_MS: {duration}')
print('--- STDOUT ---')
print(proc.stdout)
print('--- STDERR ---')
print(proc.stderr)
PY
